EvaluationSession.title: EvaluationSession
EvaluationSession.description: Represents an assessment session completed by a student on a specific topic.

userName.description: Full name of the student who completed the assessment.

topic.description: Syllabus topic custom entered for the assessment.

answer.description: The exact voiceever/written transcript response evaluated.

matchPercentage.description: The concept match percent index representing key alignments.

correctAnswerKey.description: The correct reference standard answer benchmark for evaluating the student.

gaps.description: Detailed gaps, mistakes, and missing core mechanics highlighted during analysis.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection of all subject expertise evaluation sessions completed by student users.
